channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pete Alonso's power surge helps propel Mets to NLDS Game 3 win over Phillies
item.description: Pete Alonso helped the New York Mets to a 7-2 victory thanks to his home run that gave the team some comfort room against the Philadelphia Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers coach Kyle Shanahan explains why he was 'pretty shocked' Jets fired Robert Saleh
item.description: San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan said he was "pretty shocked" to see the New York Jets fired Robert Saleh, who was his defensive coordinator prior to this job.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mark Cuban defends NBA's China partnership despite opposing 'Chinese and all human rights violations'
item.description: Dallas Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban doubled down on his public approval for the NBA's partnership with China after previously defending and embracing it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 5 of 2024 NFL season
item.description: No one could have expected the Minnesota Vikings to be an undefeated team along with the Kansas City Chiefs. But through five weeks of the NFL season, this is where we are.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kirk Cousins joined the 500-yard club but couldn't top Norm Van Brocklin's 73-year-old record
item.description: Kirk Cousins delivered a signature moment to his career with a 509-yard performance capped by a game-ending TD pass in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Phillies one defeat from elimination after 7-2 loss to Mets in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lynx return to finals with 88-77 win over Sun in Game 5 behind Collier's 27 points, 11 rebounds
item.description: Napheesa Collier had 27 points and 11 rebounds and Courtney Williams contributed 24 points and both-ends-of-the-court energy to lead the Minnesota Lynx past the Connecticut Sun 88-77 and into the WNBA Finals for the first time in seven years.
item.dc:creator: Dave Campbell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thieves slipped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's wrist, police say
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month outside a horse racing track in a Los Angeles suburb and slipped an expensive watch off his wrist as he jostled through the crowd, police said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Deion Sanders says he skipped school as a child to 'hustle' baseballs and broken bats
item.description: Colorado head football coach Deion Sanders told reporters at a news conference on Tuesday about his childhood escapades with baseball collectibles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets owner Woody Johnson says he fired Robert Saleh 1 day after meeting with Aaron Rodgers
item.description: New York Jets owner Woody Johnson said he met with Aaron Rodgers the night before firing head coach Robert Saleh, but his input didn't play into the firing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets fired Robert Saleh shortly after he decided to demote offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett: report
item.description: The New York Jets stunned the football world Tuesday when they fired head coach Robert Saleh, but a new report is leading to speculation about whose decision it was.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Woman accusing Vince McMahon of sexual abuse asks WWE to waive confidentiality agreements
item.description: A former WWE employee who filed a lawsuit against the company and ex-leader Vince McMahon, accusing him of sexual battery and trafficking, is asking them to not enforce nondisclosure agreements with other former and current employees and contractors so they can potentially come forward with similar
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aaron Rodgers needs to step up as Jets remain stagnant
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are 2-3. All the criticism is justified. They do not appear to be a group that is getting better week in and week out, they look to be rotting away. Talk of the relationship between the head coach Robert Saleh and quarterback Aaron Rodgers.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: How two Central football players are working to get recruited
item.description: A pair of local high school football stars -- Central High School's Jaime Padilla and Antonio Reyes -- are doing everything they can, even traveling the country to show college football programs what they can do.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: NCAA March Madness returning to San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- March Madness is returning to San Francisco, to Chase Center, specifically. On Wednesday, the NCAA announced that SF's Chase Center will host the 2028 Division I Men's Basketball West Regionals. The West Coast Conference will serve as the host.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
